programme.title: The Listener
programme.desc: A performer's life is threatened, so Toby poses as her assistant and helps to investigate.

programme.title: Alice, Darling

programme.title: Hit & Run [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: Charlie Bronson (Dax Shepard), a nice guy with a shady past as a getaway driver, breaks out of the witness protection program in a backwater California town to drive his girlfriend, Annie (Kristen Bell), to Los Angeles for an important job interview. The pair's road trip takes an awkward and dangerous turn when they find that an inept federal agent (Tom Arnold) and the mobster (Bradley Cooper) he testified against are both trying to hunt them down.

programme.title: Edison
programme.desc: Ambitious young reporter Pollack (Justin Timberlake) suspects insidious corruption in his town's elite police unit, known as F.R.A.T., and finds a friendly source in Deed (LL Cool J), a dissatisfied member of the squad. With Deed's information and the backing of his publisher, Ashford (Morgan Freeman), and a crusading lawyer, Wallace (Kevin Spacey), Pollack infiltrates the secretive police cabal. He finds himself in over his head, however, when he discovers the true extent of the criminality.

programme.title: My Baby Gone
programme.desc: Pregnant Emily bonds quickly with her pregnant neighbor Kelly, but Kelly is faking it and plans to steal Emily's baby.

programme.title: Homeboy [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: Though only in his 20s, professional boxer Johnny Walker is on the downswing of his career and suffering from a mild form of brain damage. Resettling in the beachfront resort of Asbury Park, N.J., he falls in with shady promoter Wesley Pendergrass and meets kindhearted boardwalk operator Ruby. When Wesley proposes cutting Johnny in on a criminal undertaking, Johnny must choose between a life of crime and a settled future with Ruby.

programme.title: A Walk To Remember
programme.desc: Two North Carolina teens, Landon Carter and Jamie Sullivan, are thrown together after Landon gets into trouble

programme.title: Paris, Texas
programme.desc: Travis Henderson, an aimless drifter who has been missing for four years, wanders out of the desert and must reconnect with society, himself, his life, and his family.

programme.title: Heathers
programme.desc: Veronica and mysterious new kid give teen angst a body count.

programme.title: Stealth
programme.desc: The world's three best pilots are partnered with a state-of-the-art, fully-automated, pilotless, super stealth warplane - inhuman and invincible. But once in the air, it goes haywire, leaving them with one final mission - bring it down.

programme.title: Only The Brave
programme.desc: Based on the real-life Granite Mountain Hotshots, an elite group of firefighters that courageously battled one of the deadliest wildfires in history, the Yarnell Hill Fire, in order to save an Arizona town.

programme.title: 30 Days Of Night
programme.desc: For centuries, vampires have stayed in the dark, forced to hide each morning or else be destroyed by the burning power of the sun. Not your parents vampires, these are eating machines, built for one purpose - to devour human beings - and only daylight can stop them... which is why they target the remote, isolated town of Barrow, Alaska, which each winter is plunged into a state of complete darkness that lasts 30 days. The cunning, bloodthirsty vampires, relishing in a month of free rein, are set to take advantage, feeding on the helpless residents. It is up to Sheriff Eben, his estranged wife, Stella, and an ever-shrinking group of survivors to do anything and everything they can to last until daylight.

programme.title: The Deep
programme.desc: A young couple discovers a cache of drugs in a sunken war ship and must run from the gangsters who stashed it.

programme.title: The Whole Town's Talking
programme.desc: A mild-mannered clerk's life is turned upside down by his exact double -- a ruthless gangster and Public Enemy Number One.

programme.title: Dead Reckoning
programme.desc: A decorated war veteran becomes entangled in the search for a fellow Medal of Honor winner's killer.

programme.title: Bonjour Tristesse
programme.desc: A wealthy playboy and his libertine daughter's hedonistic life on the French Riviera is threatened by the father's beautiful, but morally rigid, new mistress.

programme.title: Don't Knock The Twist
programme.desc: Following the preparations for a TV special on the twist, this rock 'n' roll musical features performances by Chubby Checker, Gene Chandler, Vic Dana, The Carroll Brothers and the Dovells. Musical numbers include "Duke of Earl," "Do the New Continental" and "Mash Potato Time".

programme.title: A Better Tomorrow III

programme.desc: In the 1950s, fear and violence escalate as the people of Algiers fight for independence from the French government.

programme.desc: A retired thief swears revenge on the lunatic who murdered his brother and partner, while going on the run with the loot they stole.

programme.title: Dead Ringers

programme.title: Maximum Conviction
programme.desc: While transfering two female convicts, two former black ops agents are attacked by unknown assailants.

programme.title: The Package

programme.title: 12 Rounds 3: Lockdown
programme.desc: A police officer attempts to turn in incriminating evidence of illegal activities against his fellow cops.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark 3
programme.desc: Two female survivors join forces to bring down the deadly group responsible for unleashing a hungry shark in a West Texas lake.

programme.title: Joe Baby

programme.title: Salvation
programme.desc: A foster child bonds with a snake-handling Pentecostal community but uncovers sinister truths. She must choose between reporting pastor's crimes or preserving her newfound support system, risking personal safety for a sense of belonging.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark
programme.desc: A group of virtual hunters unleash a deadly shark in a Texas lake, causing a young couple to fight for their lives during a peaceful fishing trip in a secluded cove.

programme.desc: Sanitation worker MaryBeth is in the wrong place at the wrong time when the mayor's wife is murdered. She refuses to talk to the sheriff she dislikes, but the killers know she was there. Now they're coming for her to make sure she stays silent.

programme.title: Vengeance of an Assassin
programme.desc: An assassin escapes a battle and hides out in his childhood home. As he recovers, he realizes he has to fight faster and harder to survive.

programme.title: Enter the Fat Dragon
programme.desc: A police officer investigates the mysterious death of a suspect who was in his custody during a routine transfer.

programme.title: The Daughter I Gave Away
programme.desc: In a search for answers, a woman uncovers a chilling truth.

programme.desc: Catherine Oxenberg's personal fight to save her daughter

programme.title: Taken at a Basketball Game
programme.desc: Wayne's worst fear is confirmed when he realizes his daughter has been kidnapped.

programme.title: The College Admissions Scandal
programme.desc: Two wealthy mothers obsess over getting their teens into top colleges.

programme.title: Cruel Instruction
programme.desc: Two women must band together to survive and expose a residential treatment center.

programme.title: Truth
programme.desc: Reporter's murder unites her college friend and former professor in a quest to uncover the killer's identity.

programme.title: Secret Lives
programme.desc: An attractive art professor is forced to journey into her past to discover the truth about her marriage, her deceased husband and the truth about her former married life.

programme.title: What Color is Love?
programme.desc: A white woman has an affair with a pro-basketball star and challenges him for custody of their mixed-race son.

programme.title: Love on Your Doorstep
programme.desc: A TV host profiles a local florist’s long-running flower competition in order to land her own show.

programme.title: New Dogs, Old Tricks
programme.desc: Jay's hazing ends abruptly after a Gamma Pi visit. Liz lies to cover for Mindy, causing big issues for others.

programme.title: New Dogs, Old Tricks
programme.desc: Sarah searches for her missing roommate. Jay endures Pete’s revenge as Kappa Psi sisters prep for Gamma Fair.

programme.title: I'll Be There
programme.desc: More than a decade after distancing herself from her complicated family, Grace's carefully built life is upended when her brother AJ is diagnosed with cancer. As her estranged siblings reunite in Los Angeles, Grace is forced to confront old wounds, buried loyalties, and the role she once played in her fractured family-set against the surreal backdrop of Michael Jackson's death.

programme.title: Just Getting Started
programme.desc: Duke Diver is living the high life as the freewheeling manager of a luxurious resort in Palm Springs, Calif. He soon faces competition from Leo, a former military man who likes the same woman that Duke is interested in. When Diver's past suddenly catches up with him, he must put aside his differences and reluctantly team up with Leo to stop whoever is trying to kill him.

programme.title: Murder Without Motive
programme.desc: Edmund Perry has everything going for him after he graduates with a scholarship to attend Stanford. With his dedication paying off, an encounter with a police officer senselessly ends his life.

programme.title: Take Back
programme.desc: Zara (Gillian White) and Brian (Michael Jai White) are living the perfect small town life when a mysterious stranger from Zara's secret past kidnaps their daughter and now they must race to save her life.

programme.title: The Code
programme.desc: A veteran thief recruits a younger crook to help him pull off one final job in order to repay his debt to the Russian mob.

programme.title: Broken Harmony
programme.desc: Recording artist Harmony Brown, listens to every suggestion from her record label including changing her sound, changing her look, and even changing the type of music she sang. Yet, her numbers aren’t improving, and she’s on the verge of being released from her contract. Her manager, suggests she returns to Atlanta and meet with a power house music producer to give her a refresh on her sound. However, she’s forced to stay with and reunite with her mother, and address the trauma of her childhood.

programme.title: Gigalow
programme.desc: Diamond White, a college graduate drowning in debt and raising his younger sister, turns to dancing for survival. After moving to Texas, he joins Midnight, an underground male club, and quickly rises to the top. But as money and temptation pull him deeper, Diamond must choose between responsibility and a lifestyle that could cost him everything.

programme.title: Hanging On To Love
programme.desc: Serial dater, Jewel, cannot seem to find love, until she starts to fall for the owner of her dry cleaners.

programme.title: Smoke Break
programme.desc: Trell Bell, a sharp-tongued barber balances cutting fades and dodging drama from his baby momma. When the barber shopped is suddenly robbed, and the money all gone, Trell and his crew work together to save the barber shop.

programme.title: Disaster Strike Force
programme.desc: Plummeting temperatures signify the dawn of a new Ice Age.

programme.title: The Exorcists
programme.desc: When his child is possessed by an unrelenting evil, a father hires three expert exorcists to purge the demon.

programme.title: End Times
programme.desc: In a post-apocalyptic zombie wasteland, a grizzled mercenary and a young woman must fight their way to safety.

programme.title: Killers
programme.desc: When a gang buys stolen drugs, they find themselves trapped in a warehouse with vicious assassins.

programme.title: Jack the Giant Killer
programme.desc: Deadly creatures descend upon Earth from the beanstalk. Jack is our only hope to stop them.

programme.title: Heavy Trip
programme.desc: In this offbeat comedy from Finland, Turo is stuck in a small village where the best thing in his life is being the lead vocalist for the amateur metal band Impaled Rektum. The only problem? He and his bandmates have practiced for over a decade without playing a single gig. The guys get a surprise visitor from Norwaythe promoter for a huge heavy metal music festivaland decide its now or never. They steal a van, a corpse, and even a new drummer in order to make their dreams a reality.

programme.title: The Beyond (Edited Version)
programme.desc: The seven dreaded gateways to hell are concealed in seven cursed places... And on the day the gates of hell are opened, the dead will walk the earth!From legendary Italian horror master Lucio Fulci come the ultimate classic of supernatural terror. A remote and cursed hotel, built over one of the seven gateways, becomes a yawning malevolent abyss that begins devouring both the bodies and the souls of all who enter in a graphic frenzy of gory crucifixions, chunkblowing chain-whippings, eyeball impalements, sulfuric acid meltdowns, flesh-eating tarantulas, throat-shredding demon dogs and ravenous bloodthirsty zombies. THE BEYOND is a towering achievement in hair-raising, mind-bending cinematic terror!

programme.title: Elvira's Movie Macabre: Legacy Of Blood (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Elvira presents this horror thriller where a family is stalked by an unknown killer while attending the reading of a relative's will.

programme.title: Creature From the Haunted Sea (In Color & Restored)
programme.desc: Robert Towne (screenwriter Chinatown) assumes a pseudonym to star in Roger Corman's Creature from the Haunted Sea. Renzo Capetto, a dastardly gangster, intends to smuggle a fortune out of Cuba, and it's up to Towne to infiltrate his gang. When he does, he discovers that Capetto's plan is to kill off his crew and blame their deaths on the mythical Creature from the Haunted Sea. In typical Corman fashion, the terror takes a backseat to the laughs. With campy performances, a zilch-o budget and a truly hilarious monster, this Creature is a must Sea for any B-movie fan! Spectacularly restored and in color for the first time!

programme.title: Dead Dudes In The House
programme.desc: Friends go inspect an old house. They find a grave of a woman in the front yard. One of them smashes the headstone and awakens her vengeance. The dead come alive and the living can't escape as the house locks down to keep them in, forever.

programme.title: Nightbreed: The Director's Cut (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Boone may be a troubled young man, but his troubles are just beginning. Set up as the fall guy in a string of slasher murders, he decides he'll hide by crossing the threshold that separates us from them and sneak into the forbidden subterranean realm of Midian. Boone will live among the monsters. Includes over 40 minutes of new footage, all mastered in high definition from the original camera negative!

programme.title: Glorious
programme.desc: A heartbroken man finds himself trapped in a bathroom with a strange voice who says he may be the only hope in stopping a terrible event. A SHUDDER ORIGINAL

programme.title: Sequence Break
programme.desc: An reclusive video arcade technician's reality is fractured when a mysterious new game appears in his shopm causing strange metaphysical forces and bizarre biochemical mutations.

programme.title: Jakob's Wife
programme.desc: After an encounter with "The Master," Anne discovers bite marks on her neck, a new sense of power and an appetite to live bolder than ever. As the body count grows, Anne is increasingly torn between her enticing new existence and her life before.

programme.title: Habit
programme.desc: Sam is an alcoholic grieving over his father's death. When he meets the seductive Anna at a party, he immediately falls under her spell but begins to suspect that she's an actual vampire.

programme.title: Quicksand
programme.desc: A married couple almost divorcing become trapped in quicksand while hiking through a rainforest in Colombia. They battle the elements of the jungle and must work together to survive.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Races Jetherine" - When Sonny Drysdale promises to give Elly May a ring, Granny thinks he's going to propose and becomes a matchmaker. Cousin Pearl can't stand the idea that Elly May will get married before Jethrine, so she sets to matchmaking Jethrine with Jasper Depew.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Pygmalion and Elly" - Sonny Drysdale decides he needs to be Pygmalion to Elly's Galatea and remake her from a hillbilly into a woman of society, while Granny uses love charms to heat up their relationship.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly's First Date" - Mr. Drysdale convinces his self-absorbed stepson Sonny to date Elly May to Mrs. Drysdale's consternation, while Granny and Jed make preparations for Thanksgiving.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jethro Goes to School" - Jed enrolls Jethro at an exclusive Beverly Hills elementary school. Millicent Schuyler-Potts, the proprietor of the school, is aghast when Jed and Jethro show up, convinced this is part of some ghastly hoax. After Jed says that banker Milburn Drysdale is his neighbor, she calls the banker. It turns out that Drysdale's bank holds the mortgage on the school. Schulyer-Potts suddenly warms to the charms of the Clampetts, even if it means accepting Jethro as a fifth grader.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Servants" - Ellie May starts wearing dresses but takes it as an insult when someone says she looks like a city girl. Mr. Drysdale talks Jed into taking in his butler and upstairs girl in a plan to civilize the Clampetts, but they don't quite understand the idea of servants. Miss Hathaway takes Jethro bowling and begins to show an interest in him.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Trick or Treat" - Granny wants to go home because "folks is so unfriendly, no one has come to call." Jed convinces her that they should call on them, and they find that people welcome them and give them all manner of gifts when they show up on Halloween in their normal hillbilly clothes. Also, Jed works on getting Pearl to come visit while she's trying to get hitched to the oilman and find a young man for Jethrine.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Race for Queen" - Elly May competes in a contest to determine "The Queen of Beverly Hills."

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Lafe Lingers On" - Lafe Crick comes back in another scheme to get rich off the Clampetts' wealth.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Girl From Home" - A father and daughter from back home come to Beverly Hills to meet Jed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Giant Jackrabbit" - Granny encounters a kangaroo, and thinks she's found a giant jackrabbit, but no one will believe her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale's idea for Christmas presents are ones only fit for coastal California, like diving suits and a boat, and a television set, which Granny thinks is some kind of fancy washing machine.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Get Culture" - The Clampetts decide to get a taste of culture to fit in the high-class society of Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Needs a Maw" - Mr. Drysdale needs investors for his real estate development project, so he enlists the Widow Fenwick, and aims to cement the deal by hitching her to Jed Clampett, who is looking to find a mother for his daughter, Elly May.

programme.title: The Outlaw
programme.desc: Billy the Kid, Pat Garrett, and Doc Holliday ride again in Howard Hughes' epic 1943 western, but the character you'll remember most is sultry country vixen Rio McDonald. Hughes' nationwide search for an actress to play Rio resulted in the film debut of Jane Russell, whose natural assets were allegedly helped by a special bra designed by Hughes. When The Outlaw finally received a nationwide release in 1946, its success vindicated Hughes and made Russell a star. As for Hughes' infamous bra, Russell said in her 1988 memoir, I never wore it, and he never knew.

programme.title: Range War
programme.desc: William Boyd returns in the 25th of 66 Hopalong Cassidy adventures. This time Hopalong goes undercover to expose a group of ranchers who are interfering with the building of a new railroad. Also, look for Russell Hayden as Lucky Jenkins, and Britt Wood as Speedy McGinnis. It's a great, action-packed adventure from director Leslie Selander (Flight to Mars, Riders of the Range), and further proof that no one pushes Hoppy around and gets away with it!

programme.title: The Red Rope
programme.desc: Hired killers and Old West outlaws stand front and center in this riveting tale from Hollywoods Poverty Row. Bob Steele, one of the busiest stars in movie history (everything from the silent era to Republic Pictures to working with Clint Eastwood in Hang Em High) is here as Tom Shaw, the target of a bad mans desperation and hate. Steele appeared in more than 240 movies and television shows, but was never more impressive than in The Red Rope!

programme.title: Stagecoach to Denver
programme.desc: Ride the outlaws' highway! Allan Rocky Lane stars as Red Ryder, shootin' and fightin' his way to justice in this old slugfest from Republic Pictures. This time he's a stagecoach driver battling a crooked land commissioner and his cohorts, including a sheriff on the take. Robert Blake costars as Little Beaver!

programme.title: A Lust to Kill
programme.desc: An imprisoned outlaw escapes and goes on the hunt for his brothers murderers, who just happen to be members of the outlaws own gang. He and his beloved hit the trail, but are pursued by local law enforcement, who have their own plans for justice. Starring Don Megowan, Jim Davis, and Allison Hayes.

programme.title: Law of the Pampas
programme.desc: Murder below the Equator...and Hopalong Cassidy races to action in the heart of the wild Pampas country !Hoppy (William Boyd) and his pal Lucky (Russell Hayden) head to South America to look after a herd of cattle sold by Cassidy's boss to an Argentine rancher. Unfortunately, the scoundrel Ralph Merritt (Sidney Blackmer) wants the cattle, and he's not above hiring some dangerous characters to do his dirty work. It's a test of blazing guns...under a blazing sun! Can the boys of Bar 20 lay down the law in a lawless place like the Pampas? Can Hoppy and his gang succeed in what is truly a last frontier? Watch and see!

programme.title: Andromeda: 1883

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: So there you have it. The next day, 3 more events in 40 Degrees heat. We’ve got Gavin coming into day 2 leading the pack. Kelvin De Ruiter our world champion struggling a little bit at the moment, but Yoke Race, Conan’s Wheel and then Stones to finish. There is a lot to be played for here, so stay tuned to see if Gavin can take the lead and beat Kelvin overall.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We’re in the Serbian city of Novi kozarci, for the next stage in the world series. And what a fantastic line up we have for you again. But it is going to be one of the hottest stages yet. A Strongman competition in 44-degree heat. It will be a real challenge for these athletes to finish this event. From all over the world the strongmen came here for the title! Welcome to the heat hell in Serbia.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome to day 2 in Serbia, and its another baking hot one. We are in Kikinda today! We’ve got three more gruelling events for our athletes. Sami Ahola is leading the pack, so can he be the first Finnish athlete to take an SCL title. Stay tuned to find out.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: In this competition, we have our athletes paired up. They’re going to have to take on each event together, having to factor in each other’s strengths and possibly weaknesses. Can the men who normally work alone, share their powers as a duo? Let’s find out!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Day 2 of the famous Team World championship here in Finland- Joensuu. Welcome to the final day of the world’s strongest team event. The race to be the best team in the world is coming to its crowing point. All is still wide open for any of these to take the title. Who is going to win? Will team Latvia keep their World Title or maybe Finland can attach them? Keep watching and we’ll find out.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome back to Strongman Champions League for another stage of the 2022 world tour. We’re in Esposende - Portugal in this beautiful setting next to the beach in front of a packed crowd with some of the strongest men the world has to offer. With a real Porsche deadlift and many other crazy stuff. So, lets get this show started.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Hello and welcome in Gloucester, UK. The world tour hasn’t been here for what feels like forever. And now for the first time in the Mekka of Strongman, the SCL World series will crown a great Champion with the SCL Title. It will be full with special wooden events, and a great winner! So ladies and gentleman, boys and girls, brace yourselves because I present to you strongman champions league UK.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are in Sopot, Poland the home of Legends Mariusz Pudzianowkski and Krzystof Radzikowski. Who will grab the title here in holiday resort Sopot, on the great Balrtic Sea with 6 events and 12 athlets in the mix!

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Chef Ayesha Nurdjaja sticks around for a hilarious Friday dessert episode as Carla Hall bakes her portable Sweet Potato Cobbler Bars. The group shares funny stories about accidentally cursing in front of kids, debates the most overrated desserts, and reveals the secret ingredients their grandmothers used to make their family recipes so special.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly attempts to make a viral "Croffle" (croissant waffle) out of puff pastry, but chaos ensues when he messes up the first try. Pivoting quickly, he serves it up as a warm dessert with ice cream and chocolate syrup. The hosts hilariously discuss the realities of aging and male menopause.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Guest chef Christian Petroni brings his energy to the kitchen to cook Rigatoni Alla Vodka except he swaps the vodka for red wine. The crew debates "sauce versus gravy," discusses the proper saltiness of pasta water, and reveals the foods they absolutely despise. The episode ends with a giveaway of Christian's cookbook.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's Halloween season, and Carla Hall is making her Banana Pudding Trifle in portable mason jars. She skips the traditional Nilla wafers for buttery Chessmen cookies to keep the crunch. The hosts chat about their favorite Halloween costumes, debate the merits of kitchen gadgets, and deal with Michael's impatience over Carla's loud mixer.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: The Halloween celebrations kick off with guest Jeanette Donnarumma, former culinary producer for The Rachael Ray Show. Clinton Kelly attempts a spooky "Cheese Rat" appetizer made from cream cheese, curry powder, and mango chutney. The group laughs at the questionable rat shape, shares TV producer behind-the-scenes stories, and Jeanette shakes up an Apple Cider Margarita spritz.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's cozy comfort food season as Michael Symon cooks a hearty Beef and Butternut Squash Stew. While the meat braises, the hosts share their favorite podcasts to listen to while doing chores, universally bash the idea of the "Turducken", and discuss the possibility of a future Chewed Up cookbook.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's finally Halloween. Michael dresses up as a giant Minion while Carla Hall makes festive Graveyard Dirt Cups. Using a rich chocolate mousse, crushed cookies, and gummy worms, it's the perfect spooky dessert. The trio debates the merits of candy corn, reminisces about retro sweets, and Michael shares a hilarious story of chasing down an ice cream truck.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon whips up crispy homemade tater tots with a rich gruyere fondue dip. While frying the tots, the trio gets delightfully derailed when Michael accidentally misspeaks, leading to uncontrollable laughter. A grumpy Clinton complains about his restless legs, Carla relives a past cooking competition disaster, and the group answers fan mail about holiday crafts. The episode wraps with a fan giveaway.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly embraces "sweater weather" by making a savory Butternut Squash, Spinach, and Blue Cheese Pie. While he cooks, the hosts discuss expensive clothing habits and the woes of tight pants. A cooking question about pie layers hilariously derails into a conversation about dating terminology, and Michael reveals he is passing the Thanksgiving hosting torch to his son. The episode concludes with Michael giving away a lucky golf putter.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's Friday dessert day, and Carla Hall is making a comforting Peach Cobbler Pound Cake mashup. While Carla bakes, Michael Symon annoys Clinton Kelly with a deafening hand mixer. The trio discusses their favorite childhood holiday cookies, passionately debates whether black-and-white cookies are actually good, and shares ideas for crazy food mashups. The episode ends with a giveaway of a custom-designed apron from Carla.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly dodges cooking duty by bringing in guest Chef Leah Cohen to tackle a fan's fridge. Leah whips up incredible Chicken Lettuce Wraps using ground chicken, hoisin, and leftover rice. The hosts talk Pop-A-Shot basketball, picky kids, and Michael gives away a very meaningful piece of his restaurant history.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon takes on the Fan Fridge challenge, cooking from Pat in Peoria's refrigerator. He prepares a beautiful Pan-Roasted Salmon with crispy skin, served alongside a bright Greek-inspired salad of avocado, cucumber, olives, feta, and red curry paste. The crew jokes about Nick's organizing skills and reads fan mail.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Fan Fridge Week wraps up on Friday as Carla Hall transforms leftovers into a decadent Banana Bread French Toast. Using cottage cheese, oat milk, and eggs for a rich custard, she tops the sweet treat with a tart lemonade reduction, fresh berries, and chocolate syrup. The hosts discuss taking the show on the road in a van.

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Chicken Pot Pie" - Chris makes a recipe for beginner chicken pot pie from Allrecipes.com, using leftover chicken and canned potatoes. Yes, potatoes from a can.

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Creamy Gochujang Pasta" - Majordomo TV’s Chris Ying unlocks the mystery of the TikTok trend of creamy gochujang pasta and wonders if it’s actually just a bad substitute for vodka sauce.

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Marry-Me Chicken" - Chris whips up the infamous “Marry-Me Chicken,” one of the most searched for recipes of 2022 due to its alleged ability to coax a marriage proposal from a reluctant lover.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: The Beef is gone. The Bear (season 2) is here. Dave and Chris start by talking about how underrated Chicago is as a food city, and how it lends itself to culinary innovation. They then break down Season 2 of 'The Bear,' from poaching chefs to expediting. They talk some Sydney leadership criticism, discuss the realities of the famous "Forks" episode, and how Carmy's relationship reflects real chef relationships. They finish with a MOIF about restaurants with waitlists you can join remotely. Listen to this episode, Chef!

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: Dave starts off by walking through the career path of today's returning guest, Chef Edward Lee. He is then joined by Edward, and they talk about Edward's new role as a celebrity chef in Korea, his new restaurant SHIA, being a Korean American, bourbon, and much more. Dave closes by answering an Ask Dave about fruit leftovers.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: On today's episode, Dave and Chris start with a blind ranking of stadium food...and Dave has some hot takes. They then interview New York Yankee, Cy Young award winner, and food lover, Gerrit Cole, who impresses them with his food knowledge and gives them insights into food and wine habits in his life and in Major League Baseball. Dave and Chris finish with an extensive Ask Dave answer on the history of plating and how to plate a dish.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: Dave talks about the next food trend in his 25 for 25 list: small plates. programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: In ancient Greece Plutarch famously stated, "We do not sit at a table to eat but to eat together." Diane cooks up a series of meze dishes that are easy to prepare, healthy, and made to be savored with others. She’ll be speaking with Dr. Esther Sternberg, author of Well at Work and former Research Director, Andrew Weil Center for Integrative Medicine.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Fasting is deeply rooted in Greek culture and religion. Diane explores some of the plant-based foods of abstention that make up part of the fasting diet and speaks with Professor Valter Longo, whose research on the benefits of fasting for longevity and wellness have catapulted him to global renown.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Grains are the feel-good food of the Greek and Mediterranean diet, providing nutrition, versatility and soul-warming comfort. Diane visits Pnyka bakery where they grind their own flour from an ancient strain of grain. In the kitchen, Diane shares her knowledge and love of grains with 3 easy Greek-Mediterranean recipes.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Beans are a superfood linked to longevity and play a starring role in Greek cuisine. Diane explores dried vs. canned beans, visits an Athens legume shop, and chats with Dr. William Li on their health benefits. She shares satisfying, easy-to-make recipes to help you eat well and feel great.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane embraces the words of Hippocrates, "Let food be thy medicine and medicine be thy food." She explores Greek staples—olive oil, herbs, nuts, veggies—as health foundations. Plus, three simple recipes and a chat with Dr. William Li, author of Eat to Beat Disease.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: The CentralTirgus is the biggest covered city food market in Europe. Just aside the Art Nouveau Old Town, we find century-old rye-bread making, grilled lampreys, soviet milk sausages, and hemp butter. Here the best of Latvian traditions are pushed fast-forward into the digital era by young and curious chefs, bloggers, and pop-up restaurants.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: The 'green' city of Germany has an incredible gothic cathedral with a food market at its feet. Every morning, six days a week, farmers from the Black Forest bring their trout and herb pestoes, wild berries, and smoked ham to the city. Be it a vegan wurst or a tasty cheesecake, here the surprises never finish!

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: The old ladies selling their baskets full of vegetables and cheese on the Dolac market in Zagreb bring us back in time. At the market, we go from the breathtaking Mediterranean islands to the Austrian Alps, from freshly caught hake and simple Baltic snacks to internationally awarded cheese and a unique Turkey breed.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: The Viktualienmarkt developed from an original farmers' market to a popular market for gourmets. The market also hosts a number of traditional and folkloric events. But the center of the social life of the city is the world-famous Biergarten - here the seven historical breweries of the city pour the finest beers of the world.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: Perhaps one of the most beautiful and well-organized food market buildings in Europe is the Mercado Central of Valencia. Built on the area where an open-air market stood for centuries, the Valencian style Art Noveau construction is a 'Cathederal of senses'.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: The market of San Benedetto in Cagliari is the island's belly. It is one of the biggest fresh produce markets in Europe and arguably said to be the biggest fish market in Europe. A paradise for food lovers, where every stall keeper has a story to tell.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: The O'Kane family's patience is truly tested during a complete to-the-studs kitchen renovation. Homeowner Yvonne starts to get impatient to feed her family home cooked dinners. Added pressure: another fireplace to deal with, uneven floors, custom cabinets and an uncovered secret staircase. (All that plus a new puppy.) Thanks to Mar's 6 design principles this custom space is unique and stunning.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: It's 'Lost in Space' because somehow these home makeover clips never made it to Mar's! Bloopers Alert! Unseen Tips Alert! Inspired by viewer feedback, an entire show that includes highlights of the greatest gaffs, goofs and guffaws. Plus, some renovation and makeover projects never before aired.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Mar Jennings uses his 6 Casual Luxury design principles to transform a typical master bedroom, closets and bath into a boutique, hotel-style oasis. The O'Kanes are desperate to stop sleeping on their couches and get back into their master bedroom - but with a new cathedral ceiling installation, private deck installation, custom vanities, several setbacks and delays this renovation won't be easy.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Not only does Mar Jennings have the task of pleasing the adult O'Kanes, but he has to satisfy Teddy, a young man between childhood and young adulthood. AND try to make space in an already-small bedroom. Can it even be done? All while juggling two desk and office spaces-for Teddy and his parents. Mar's unexpected solutions for this kids bedroom and office makeover are truly Casual Luxury.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: More things that regular episodes just couldn't fit in, so we say they didn't quite make it to Mar's! Filled with some of Mar's favorite people and places that viewers wanted to see more of, and of course some delightfully hilarious bloopers, too. Plus, more renovation, makeover and design sMARt tips (like fixing uneven floors) and great locations. As always, Casual Luxury has no boundaries.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Mar is tasked with carving out two new basement rooms from storage space: a studio and laundry room. With Mar's 6 design principles, he must make dark and dank become bright and stunning. The homeowners expect to be wowed by these 'creative' and 'clean' space makeovers, but with pipes and beams in the way and unexpected challenges, this project might just push Mar over the edge.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Homeowners Neil & Yvonne challenge Mar to makeover a pool area-adjacent media room and make it all-season functional for entertaining. Mar uses his 6 exclusive Casual Luxury design principles to completely re-think the area, including reclaiming basement space to add a bonus kitchenette & full bath. Walls and a fireplace must go! Will the family be ready to entertain-and will they love the reveal?

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Witness the renovation evolution of some truly reMARkable outdoor living spaces: new pergola, new pool deck and new sun deck. (You won't believe the magical makeover transformation of the garage roof!) And Mar gets a visit from a TV friend, who he sneaks in for peek at the progress before the family gets their final look at the space.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Can Mar handle a surprise project? You bet. Follow this unplanned-for renovation and design overhaul of the main floor family room and living room. Mar's hope for the reveal? That the O'Kane family will love the relaxed feeling of the family room and how he's upping the glamour quotient of the living room. Meanwhile, a secret time capsule sheds light on the home's history.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Watch as the landscape makeover design takes shape, going from overgrown and out of place to perfectly balanced, for the ultimate Casual Luxury curb appeal. Sometimes, the design process hurts. Mar needs the homeowner, Yvonne, to put nostalgic connections aside in order to handle the extensive renovations required.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Time to gut and renovate two out-of-date and well-used kids' bathrooms! As payback for being displaced, the 3 kids 'treat' Mar to the Trapeze School of New York-he responds with a trip to Six Flags new England. (Cue the screaming.) Meanwhile, the transformational Casual Luxury bathroom makeovers are taking shape. After only a few surprises and challenges, this reveal is the kids' favorite one yet.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Season 2 premiere. Mar Jennings, known as America's Top Lifestyle Expert, is ready to renovate all the homes on his Westport, CT street. First up is a huge addition for neighbors Andrea and Bob's 1930's saltbox. Find out if Mar's new design team is up for the challenge. Part 1 of 2.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Season premiere part 2. Mar began a huge addition on the Nook, a 1930's saltbox, for his neighbors Bob and Andrea. But at the beginning of the dining and den walkthrough the homeowners were unreadable. Tune in to see if they will approve of Mar's progress and designs.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Master bedrooms and baths are things that dreams are made of until some nightmare hiccups happen. Turns out that visiting Broadway show sets provides unexpected inspiration. Amid creating the serene décor, Mar also finds a practical way to hide a litter box, and his team takes bets on which design his fans vote for.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: In this outdoor transformation episode, Mar is thrilled to reveal the final touches on the Nook, a 1930's saltbox, for his neighbors Bob and Andrea. Complete landscaping, outdoor dining and patio, garage, driveway, gas lantern and so much more.

programme.title: Alternative Dwellings

programme.desc: Electrician builds out a 4x4 sprinter into a modern camper that they are able to both live in and work mobile. programme.title: Rosey & The Rowdy Rustlers Tour Bus - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Rosey and The Rowdy Rustlers are coming to town to kick off their concert tour! But while driving out on the open road, a giant stray tumbleweed gets in the path of their tour bus, making a mighty mess! Rosey, Roxie, and Rude Jenny will have to take a detour to Carl’s Car Wash! With a quick mess assessment, Carl’s suds-sational car wash is ready to give Rosey and The Rowdy Rustlers’ vehicle a good scrub-a-dub! The band leaves as happy customers, and just in time for the concert!

programme.title: Who Took The Cookie? (Finny the Shark) - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Finny’s friends are playing a game of Who Took The Cookie From The Cookie Jar. Who do you think took the cookie? The seahorse, the starfish, the octopus, the walrus, the dolphin, or the crab? Let’s play and find out!

programme.title: Moolissa The Underwater Cow - Finny The Shark and more
programme.desc: Finny’s class finds out they have a new special friend coming for a visit, a cow named Moolisa! Being from land, it can be tricky for Moolisa to do everything that Finny’s friends do in the sea, but Moolisa will try her best to share in all the experiences of life in the ocean.

programme.title: Five Little Monsters Jumping On The Bed - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Here’s a silly and slightly spooky version of the classic kids’ rhyme, Five Little Monkeys, with monsters instead of monkeys. It’s a great song for practicing counting down from five, and for teaching little monsters (and children!) not to jump on the bed.

programme.title: Red Light Green Light - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Tobee learned all about traffic safety in school today! He learned how to walk in a crosswalk, to look both ways before crossing a street, and what the colors of a traffic light mean. That reminds Caitie of a song about stopping and going called “Red Light, Green Light.” Together, they sing and dance, stopping and starting again and again. Tobee and Caitie have a blast, and you can join the fun, too! Green light!

programme.title: Twinkle Twinkle Little Star - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: “Twinkle, twinkle little star. How I wonder what you are?” Lulu the Owl and Juno the Star become fast friends in this Super Simple version of one of the world’s most popular nursery rhymes.

programme.title: Finny The Shark - Down In The Bay and more
programme.desc: Did you ever see a shark glowing in the dark? Did you ever see a stingray dancing at the ballet? Finny and Mama Shark are singing a rhyming song about all of their silly friends down in the bay! Sing along!

programme.title: The Super Simple Show - Counting and Numbers
programme.desc: The Super Simple show is a compilation of Super Simple’s most popular songs and series that our fans love! This compilation is all about Numbers and Counting! Includes children's song favorites "10 Little Buses", “10 In the Bed” & "10 Little Dinosaurs" and featuring Carl's Car Wash, The Bumble Nums, Sing Along With Tobee, and More!

programme.title: The Super Simple Show - Underwater
programme.desc: This compilation is about Underwater! Includes children's songs "Baby Shark", "Sailor Went To Sea" and More!

programme.desc: This compilation is about Space & Planets! Includes children's songs "Mr. Golden Sun", “Skidamarink” & "More!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies grow and change, so does the landscape around them. From fiery red leaves to falling snowflakes; from flowers in bloom to fireworks in July, every season of the year has its own special magic just waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As each day passes, babies' awareness of the world around them -- and all the wonders it holds -- continues to develop. Wild animals are especially intriguing and World Animals captures the spirtit of little ones' fascination with wild creatures as it introduces them to animals living in the jungle, in the ocean, and on the savannah.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Learn about the numbers 1,2,3,4 & 5 through rhyme, real-life footage, counting, stories, and repetition - accompanied by classical music and real world imagery.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Set off on a fun-filled "field trip" with your baby to discover animals found at the park, on the farm, and in your own backyard.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: At 12 months, babies can identify specific sounds, and they re also starting to match the sounds they hear with the objects that make them. Meet the Orchestra -- First Instruments presents your little "maestro" with a playful introduction to the sights and sounds of a real orchestra -- from the clashing of cymbals to the purring of the cello and everything in between!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Share a rainbow of sights and sounds with your baby as you discover the wonders of color together! Join puppet host "Vincent Van Goat" as he creates six Van Gogh masterpieces exploring red, green, blue, yellow, orange, and purple. World Of Colors is a spirited celebration of creative expression.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As their communication skills continue to develop, little ones begin to recognize common words and may point to objects or pictures when these items are named. Baby Wordsworth playfully taps into your little one's natural curiosity and introduces 30 words from around the home -- both spoken and in sign language. This engaging program presents little ones with familiar objects in the kitchen, playroom, yard and more -- from the living room window to their favorite teddy bear.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover the wonderful world of water and deep dive into all the amazing creatures that call the ocean home. Learn simple words about the sea like water, coral reef, and ocean through narration and repetition. Engaging live-action footage of your favorite ocean friends and classical melodies will dazzle your little explorer as they experience the magical world under the sea.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Meet Cats, Dogs, Birds, Bugs and Woodland Creatures! Learn simple words through narration and repetition. Meet all sorts of creatures from domestic kittens to jungle cats, puppies, big and small birds, butterflies, lady bugs, otters and deer!! See whimsical toys and puppets.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Enjoy the best of summer, autumn and winter with Baby Einstein! Discover the familiar sights and sounds of the different seasons. Learn names of common objects associated with each through repetition and narration and see engaging images of whimsical toys that celebrate each. Discover the magic of each season from falling leaves, rolling beach balls and even snowmen.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones grow, their innate sense of wonder grows too, creating an occasion for celebration with each new discovery. Baby Galileo Discovering the Sky introduces them to that remarkable canopy above us: the sun and moon, fluffy clouds, shimmering stars, colorful planets and whirling galaxies.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Journey to the classroom with your favorite Baby Einstein friends! Learn about what makes your face incredible, baby's first sounds, and counting in different languages with a focus on Spanish! Real-life engaging imagery, upbeat classical melodies and gentle narration and repetition introduce first words, faces and a variety of different languages to young viewers.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Hop aboard to see vehicles that travel by land, water and sky! See real-life images of cars, boats and planes in this on-the-go adventure that features cameos from some of your favorite Baby Einstein characters, all while listening to music from around the world.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Between 12 and 24 months, little ones become increasingly interested in more complex ideas and begin to explore numbers and counting. Numbers Nursery introduces little ones to numerals 1 through 5 in a captivating, interactive way that invites them to join in, clap their hands and count out loud.

programme.title: Rainbow Wheels On The Bus - Little Eddie
programme.desc: Watch the bus goes on an adventure through the town! Also learn other popular & kids friendly songs!

programme.title: Kids TV Cartoon Shows
programme.desc: Loco Nuts revolves around the fun adventures of 6 animal friends – Alex (the bear), John (the elephant), Ruby (the cat), Charlie (the mischievous monkey), Lily (the rabbit) and Toby (the dog). They love to play pranks on one another but also are there to help when one of them is in trouble. A silent comedy, the series is a laugh riot that can be enjoyed by all ages.

programme.desc: Five Little Duck, Bingo The Dog, Incy Wincy Spider and many more Boom Buddies rhymes! Happy singing!

programme.desc: The Hedgehogs congregate on the Floating Island in their latest effort to find their mother. But Sleet and Dingo also have an interest in this island.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: After Antoine saves Sally's life during a raid, Sonic can't stand his bragging and zips in to see Uncle Chuck, who finds out his "bug" in Robotnik's HQ is malfunctioning.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Bob and the gang have got a big job on - repairing some pipework in Farmer Pickles field. / Bob, Scoop & Muck have to make repairs to a tunnel. When they arrive on site, Bob sends Muck ahead into the tunnel with a load of bricks.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and The Freedom Fighters journey to Robotnik's underground air base in a mission to reprogram the launch data on Robotnik's fleet of Stealth-Bot aircraft. While attempting to reprogram the Stealth-Bot computer system.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: During a mission to one of Robotnik's factories, Sally is taken prisoner by Robotnik and Snively, who construct a roboti-sized "Sally" clone, complete with Sally's personality, and mannerisms. The double tricks Sonic into rescuing "Sally".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and the Freedom Fighters journey to Robotnik's lab in hopes of deciphering his roboti-sizer system. While underground, Sonic spots his now roboti-sized Uncle Chuck aboard a Badlands bound mine-train and devises a plan for his rescue.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sally, Rotor, Bunnie and Antoine take off in a homemade airplane, bound for an ancient city hidden deep in the Great Mountains, while Sonic follows via his favorite transportation, his sneakers.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: While on a mission to the big city to replace Nicole's malfunctioning microchip, Sonic and Sally encounter the Guardian, a mysterious cloaked figure who guards a dormant wizard named Lazar and his computer of evil spells.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic is hired into an obvious trap when a frustrated Robotnik decides to appeal to the Hedgehog's ego and announces a "race to determine the fastest on Mobius".

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: As Sonic begins to chow chili dogs for a snack, he finds a message in the sack from his mother urging him to head to Speedster Island.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonic becomes aggravated that maybe their efforts of fighting for freedom seem pointless. Sonia suggests that they go to the Oracle for advice.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik has his eyes set upon Queen Aleena's crown jewel, but Sonic, Manic and Sonia plan to retrieve the gem before Robotnik.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Everyone is frightened because some visiting birds keep trying to sit on their heads. According to Chirpee, the birds just enjoy sitting on people's heads. Rainbow Ruby designs hats where the birds can comfortably sit without disturbing the villagers. // The village friends were planning to have some fun with the rainbow fish but they're all disappointed to discover that the lake has frozen over.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The friends are very tired because Mr. Moon hasn't come to sing them their nightly lullaby. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an Astronaut and flies to space to look for Mr. Moon with her friends. // In Rainbow Village, a super frantic Thunderbell is high up in the air, trapped inside a giant bubble. Thunderbell got trapped in a giant bubble in the middle of a bubble bath. In order to find out a way to bring Thunderbell back to earth, Rainbow Ruby turns into a scientist.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina accidentally broke Felicia's house, leaving Felicia homeless. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an architect and builds a house that suits Felicia's demands. // Gina is extremely worried. She needs strawberries for the Rainbow Fruit Ice Cream Festival that's starting soon but the strawberries are all mixed in with other red objects.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell is sad because he's discovered a new fruit and eaten all of it. Now there's none left and he'll never be able to eat that fruit again. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a farmer. // Thunderbell has a terrible tummy ache. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Microbiologist to find out why Thunderbell is sick. Rainbow Ruby uses a microscope to find a bacterium inside the cheesecake Thunderbell had but Felicia accidentally casts a spell that makes the bacterium gigantic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling takes Rainbow Ruby to Ellie's cabin where she meets mischievous baby stars that fell from the sky. The baby stars were playing together, got separated from their mother and ended up in Rainbow Village. // Kiki is extremely upset because the jewel Prince Frederick gave her as a gift broke. The friends try to glue the broken pieces together but it doesn't work. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a jewelry designer and tries designing jewelry with the broken pieces.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When Ruby and Choco arrive at the village, they find a very worried looking Ling Ling. Gina, Ellie, and Thunderbell went camping in Rainbow Forest but they saw a monster in the forest, got scared and had to run away. // Ruby is struggling to make a doll with her dad. Ruby and Choco get their suitcase and as Ruby swings her umbrella, there they are, in front of Rainbow fountain. Mayor Ling Ling tells her that today is the day of Princess Kiki's ballet performance.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ruby is looking at shoes that are now too small for her but she is unwilling to throw away. Ling Ling is worried about Thunderbell. His scooter broke so he is not able to carry out his work as a mail carrier. // Gina calls Rainbow Ruby because today is the day to show their appreciation to Mayor Ling Ling. It took a long time for the village friends to prepare an amazing painting for the mayor. Unfortunately, Thunderbell accidentally destroyed the painting while delivering it.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: There is a new menu at the restaurant, which is very popular. There is a long line in front of the restaurant but there weren't enough staff members to serve the villagers the food. Rainbow Ruby turns into a waitress using her magic suitcase and serve tables kindly. // Rainbow Village is full of marbles. The marbles that Rainbow Ruby spilled in her room poured down into the village from up above the sky! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a paramedic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina, Thunderbell, and Choco try to cheer Jessy up but their efforts are of no use. While talking to Mayor Ling Ling, Rainbow Ruby realizes that today is the day that Jessy first arrived in Rainbow Village! Jessy was upset that her friends forgot such a meaningful day to her. // Ling Ling has caught a bad cold and was sneezing all over the place. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a doctor and cares for him.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried about the play planned for tonight. There are no costumes ready for the villagers so it's hard to figure out which roles they're playing. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a costume designer and designs costumes for her friends. // It is very windy in Rainbow village and Paige, a paper doll, is flying to wherever the wind takes her. She is so light that she is blown away by the wind. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a fire fighter and rescue Paige.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried that the villagers are all in low spirits. Ruby thinks of fun games to play but the villagers say that they have already played all of the games too many times. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a singer. // Ling Ling is worried because of the "Secret Present Swapping Party" that Thunderbell is preparing. Thunderbell forgot to send out the invitations. Rainbow Ruby turns into a mail carrier and delivers the invitations.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that a Rainbow Ball Tournament is about to start soon but he is worried because the field is covered with pokey pods. Thunderbell, Ellie, and Gina are trying to pick them up and clear the field but it is not easy since the pokey pods are so spikey. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that he lost his glasses. Then Ellie tells her she lost her needles, Gina her hat, and Thunderbell his wheels. Who could have taken away all these things?

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is waiting for Rainbow Ruby, looking worried. It turns out that Mr. Sloth's best friend Chirpee is depressed. Chirpee wants to fly high but is struggling due to his small wings and lack of means to learn how to fly. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that the dress that the paper doll Paige was planning to wear to Kiki's dance party is torn. Paige very much wants to go to the party but she cannot go without a dress.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: In Rainbow Village, people are busy preparing for a dance marathon, a competition in which all of the villagers participate. Ling Ling is very sad that Ellie decided not to participate. Ellie is not a confident dancer so she doesn't want to participate. // Rainbow Ruby's friends tell her that they are now friends with Felicia. They were playing hide and seek but Felicia is such a good hider that she's refused to come out even though she's won the game.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Kiki wants to become a movie actress but the villagers have no idea how to direct a movie. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a movie director. She then assigns roles to the village friends. // Ling Ling rushes toward Rainbow Ruby to tell her that a busy villager mom asked him to take care of her three children but he just doesn't have time to look after them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a babysitter and starts babysitting the children.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Princess Kiki is asleep, UP IN THE AIR! According to the note that Kiki left behind, a princess falls under a spell from time to time and in order to break it, they need to play the music box nearby Kiki. But the music box is broken. // Rainbow Ruby and Choco discover cars moving in every direction. Ling Ling asks Rainbow Ruby for help and she uses her magic suitcase to become a police officer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that today is Noodle Festival day in the village but there is a problem. The problem is that the noodle tree, which grows noodles, decided to take a year off and is not growing any noodles this year. // Ling Ling and the friends are worried about the discouraged Gina. Gina just announced that she will stop doing somersaults anymore because she accidentally hurt her friends while practicing.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Apple isn't paying attention when Strawberry describes their campout tradition of telling "Tall Tales." So Apple tells her thrilling adventure of a wild road rally she entered, only to surprise the girls by proving the story is actually true.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Apple's rave review on her berryweb page of Strawberry's new dessert starts a booming mail order dessert business for Berry Bitty City. When Strawberry's stuffed-up nose makes her bake a bad-tasting cake, Apple, afraid the truth will hurt Strawberry's reputation, proclaims it's delicious. The fib snowballs when the Queen of Berryvania reads Apple's review and orders Strawberry's new cake for her ball.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Berrykin Bloom's braggart cousin, Berrykin Bertram, has won the hot sauce competition at the local county fair year after year.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When Apple feels left out of a Berryball game and an advanced ballet class, she invents some "groove booties" programmed to dance to any beat. She temporarily impresses her friends with her dance moves, but when the groove booties go out of control and threaten the town's Berryball game, she is forced to fess up.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When the girls discover that Apple's groove booties can teach the pups to dance, Plum gets an idea for a Doggie Dance Show. Wanting to impress them, Huck offers to have TomTom join the show... despite the pup's obvious dislike of performing in public. It's up to Strawberry to help Huck see that he should not force TomTom into something he just doesn't want to do.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry and Orange are dangling their legs in the stream when something tickles Orange's foot. She is sent squealing from the water, certain an eel is after her. Strawberry good-naturedly chuckles at her antics. But Orange gets her dander up and wades into the water to face her "attacker." When she looks down into the water, gazing up at her is the cutest, most adorable, puffy-cheeked fish she's ever seen. It's love at first sight. Orange has to take him home.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: At the next Storytime, Strawberry is going to read a new poem. We see her at the podium as she finishes writing it, one afternoon when no one else is in the café except Custard and Pupcake. Strawberry clears her throat and reads the poem aloud. It's a simple, sweet rhyme about the magic of making wishes on falling stars. She tries a few different rhymes as she goes, noting them on her paper. She is startled to hear applause from Mr. Longface Caterpillar who has heard her recital.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: From the BerryWorks to Strawberry's Café, everyone is excited about who will win this year's Spring Flower Festival! Berry Bitty City is decorated with colorful banners proclaiming the big event. Lemon works the hardest. For weeks she has watered her violets by day and sung to them at night, doing everything she can to win first prize. With the contest just a day away, Lemon is at her garden early.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake's friends watch her with wide eyes as she everrrrr-so-gently squirts a layer of blueberry smoothie into a tall glass, trying to not disturb the five other multi-colored layers beneath it. It's her tenth attempt to create the world's first Rainbow Smoothie! She has even painted one wall of her café rainbow colors in honor of the soon-to-be new item on the menu. No one dares breathe for fear of spoiling the delicate touch of a master smoothie-squirter at work.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Blueberry ordered some Zippy Gro daisy seeds and planted them in her garden. She is surprised that they've sprouted in less than a day despite their descriptive moniker. Strawberry comes by to admire them and Blueberry is reminded that the new cookbook Strawberry ordered has arrived. Strawberry is excited to try out the new corn muffin recipe, as its level of difficulty will be a challenge for her. Strawberry follows the muffin recipe, mixes the ingredients, and double checks it.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry is at Orange's store to mail a birthday card to a friend in Big Bitty City. Just after she drops the card into the mail slot, an ill postal carrier bee sneezes sending envelopes and post cards flying in all directions. The two girls help Jadeybug, a postal clerk, and Postmaster Bee gather up the strewn letters and the ill bee gets sent home from work.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: While rehearsing a song alone in her cafe, Strawberry is interrupted by the arrival of Jadeybug. The poor ladybug is stressed out because her twin cousins, Kadiebug and Sadiebug, left her a message that they are coming to visit for a whole week. Jadey is unable to host them because she's having her guest room repainted.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Plum decides to hold a dance recital at Strawberry's Café Cabaret stage and sends out a stack of invitations. She forgets, however, to check the sign-up sheet at the Café and schedules it for the same night as Blueberry is scheduled to read to the baby Berrykins. Strawberry tells Plum she cannot hold the recital in the Café on her chosen day because the Café is booked.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: All of Berry Bitty City is gathered around to watch the last snowberrykin melt. As the last bit of snow forms a puddle, a cheer goes up, spring is here! It's now time for the annual BerryFest. But with Princess Berrykin out of town on business, who will be the BerryFest Princess and preside over the festival?! Everyone is abuzz with how to go about choosing the Princess and what her duties will be. Postmaster Bee declares the only fair way to go about it is to hold an election. Everyone agrees.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry opens her front door to a throng of Berrykins all cheering for the new BerryFest Princess. She is appreciative of their admiration but unsure of exactly what her duties entail. In response the Berrykins bombard her with her duties - major to miniscule. One Berrykin sums it up by telling her she's responsible for presiding over all the activities of the BerryFest to make it the best.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Overhearing Blueberry reading a story to the baby Berrykins about the scary Galumphalot, Orange is uncharacteristically shaken. She determines she doesn't want anything scary around her, just relaxation. But while the girls are having a hair-styling party at Lemon's salon, a malfunction at the BerryWorks causes the whole town to go dark. And Orange begins to get really anxious.
